goal: Forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay: verify reproducibility, detect leakage, confirm same-window improvement, and deliver a final CONFIRMED / DOWNGRADED / REJECTED verdict.
global_constraints: Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune the base.
No new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes allowed.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate independent runs — never aggregated.
Rule-based (threshold / bucket) overlay must be validated before any model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE verdict only after every forensic block passes; any confirmed leakage triggers REJECTED.
No mixing of reproduction checks, leakage checks, and new ideas in the same run.

stages.title: Freeze и постановка forensic-cycle
stages.objective: Open dedicated audit project, freeze immutable reference, and register all open forensic items.
actions: Open research_project for v11 forensic cycle.
Record v10 claimed success and list specific red flags in research_record.
Lock immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Define research_map axes: audit_block, side, run_type, leakage_type, comparison_window, final_verdict.

Create open-items register: reference_integrity, window_integrity, feature_leakage_audit, label_leakage_audit, snapshot_assembly_audit, reproduce_v10, same_window_base_runs, short_long_combined_separation, cannibalization_ownership, final_v11_verdict.
success_criteria: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with frozen reference and complete open-items register.

stages.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
stages.objective: Reproduce the full v10 pipeline — dataset, features, baselines, veto models, overlay snapshot, lockbox result — without any manual corrections.
actions: Rebuild dataset and micro-core features from raw data.
Recalculate bucket-veto and threshold-veto baselines.
Retrain best short-veto and long-veto models with identical v10 configuration.
Reassemble overlay snapshot.
Replay reported lockbox result and compare metrics.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.
stages.gate_hint: If not reproduced, downstream audits must account for divergence.

stages.title: Reference integrity audit
stages.objective: Resolve the @1 vs @3 baseline contradiction found in v10 lockbox table.
actions: Inspect active-signal-v1@1 and active-signal-v1@3 side by side.
Compare logic, parameters, execution rules, filters, exits, symbol and window coverage.
If snapshots differ: declare v10 comparison invalid and schedule reruns against @1.
success_criteria: Clear verdict recorded: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented differences.
stages.gate_hint: If @1 != @3, all v10 lockbox comparisons must be rerun against @1 before proceeding.

stages.title: Window integrity audit
stages.objective: Verify that all v10 runs used identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows with no look-ahead.
actions: Extract exact train, selection-OOS, and lockbox window boundaries from every v10 run.
Confirm thresholds were selected only on selection-OOS, never on lockbox.
Confirm lockbox was never used to choose thresholds or labels.
Confirm same lockbox window used for base and all overlay variants.
Verify window did not shift between short / long / combined runs.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: window discipline valid or invalid with specific violations.

stages.title: Feature leakage audit
stages.objective: Confirm every micro-feature is causally clean — no future information leaks into decision time.
actions: For each micro-feature audit: source timeframe, aggregation cutoff, 5m→1h alignment, warmup/null handling, materialization alignment.
Deep-focus on cf_micro_imbalance_1h, cf_micro_close_pressure_1h, cf_micro_shock_cluster_1h.
Run shift test: shift feature ±1 bar and check if suspiciously good performance persists.
Run null-mask sanity: check if presence/absence of feature is itself a hidden signal.
Run timestamp audit: manually verify several decision timestamps.
success_criteria: Per-feature verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.
stages.gate_hint: Any confirmed leakage halts promotion path.

stages.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
stages.objective: Determine whether veto labels are near-identical to features, making model success tautological.
actions: Inspect label construction: bad_trade_pnl_balanced, fragile_trade_mae_balanced, bad_trade_composite_balanced.
Measure mutual information between label membership and cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Check for direct threshold shortcut between label definition and strongest feature.
Ablation: model with only cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Ablation: model without cf_micro_imbalance_1h.
Ablation: model with shuffled labels.
Ablation: model with shuffled feature.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.
stages.gate_hint: If labels are shortcut-prone or invalid, veto model results are unreliable.

stages.title: Snapshot assembly audit
stages.objective: Verify that veto overlay was applied in correct causal order without retroactive trade blocking or mixed long/short logic.
actions: Inspect overlay snapshot assembly logic step by step.
Verify veto decision timing relative to feature availability.
Confirm no retroactive blocking of already-opened trades.
Confirm no mixed logic between long-veto and short-veto paths.
Separately audit: short-only snapshot, long-only snapshot, combined snapshot.
success_criteria: Per-variant causal verdict recorded: decision_timing_ok, causal_blocking_ok, side_isolation_ok.

stages.title: Same-window matched reruns
stages.objective: Run base and all overlay variants on the identical lockbox window for unambiguous comparison.
actions: Run immutable base @1 on lockbox window.
Run short-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
Run long-only veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
Run combined veto overlay over base on same lockbox window.
For each run record: trades, net PnL, PF, DD, win rate, removed trades, removed winners.
success_criteria: Complete matched same-window comparison table with all four routes.
stages.gate_hint: Cannot proceed until reference, window, and snapshot audits are resolved.

stages.title: Cannibalization and ownership audit
stages.objective: Prove overlay improvement comes from removing genuinely bad trades, not from hidden interactions or coverage loss.
actions: For each route (short-only, long-only, combined): list removed trades, PnL of removed trades, share of removed losers, share of removed winners.
Check which side benefits more.
Audit weak-window repair: does overlay fix genuinely weak windows?
Audit regime-specific coverage loss: does overlay kill profitable clusters?
Compute ownership: is improvement driven by removed bad trades or by hidden base-mechanics interaction?
success_criteria: Honest ownership/cannibalization verdict per route with quantified evidence.

stages.title: Negative controls and robustness
stages.objective: Stress-test the overlay result with placebo thresholds, perturbations, and time-slice splits to rule out accidental fit.
actions: Placebo thresholds: slightly worse, slightly better, and opposite-side threshold.
Perturbation test: threshold ± small epsilon.
Time-slice robustness: first half vs second half of lockbox.
Side-perturbation: apply long threshold to short side and vice versa.
success_criteria: Robustness verdict per test: result is stable, fragile, or artifact-driven.

stages.title: Финальный вердикт по v11
stages.objective: Synthesize all audit findings into a single forensic verdict on the v10 microstructure overlay.
actions: Summarize findings from every audit block into a consolidated evidence table.

Classify outcome as CONFIRMED (all audits pass, overlay genuinely improves base), DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST (signal alive but methodology weak or improvement fragile), or REJECTED (leakage found, reference mismatched, result not reproducible).
Record final verdict and supporting evidence in research_record.
Update research_map axes with final_verdict.
Send notification with verdict summary.
success_criteria: Final forensic verdict recorded: CONFIRMED, DOWNGRADED TO WATCHLIST, or REJECTED with full justification.

warnings: v10 lockbox table referenced baseline as @3 instead of declared @1 — must be resolved in Stage 3.
v10 veto models report AUC ~0.95 which is unusually high and a shortcut/leakage risk.
v10 short/long/combined veto showed identical delta in lockbox — requires explicit explanation.
